title: Battlezone Gold Edition
notes: No sound at all. Runs fine in Classic mode. Starting a new campaign in regular mode, enemies do not spawn in, therefore making the game unplayable. Able to use Ultra graphics mode for my hardware while playing offline.
Works perfectly as of Proton 3.16-6 with Nvidia 415.25 drivers; did not test VR mode
